title: Product Engineering Intern
description: Ship user-facing features across the web stack for student tools.
details: 12-week internship. Pair programming and rapid iteration with PM and design.

title: Data Analyst Intern
description: Build analytics reports and partner with policy teams on measurable outcomes.
details: Strong candidate profile includes dashboard work and a clear story with data.

title: ML Platform Intern
description: Support model deployment tooling and internal experimentation workflows.
details: Preferred: prior model training project and familiarity with CI/CD practices.

title: UX Design Research Intern
description: Run usability studies and prototype flows for a student-facing product team.
details: Portfolio with two case studies required; mixed-methods research experience is a plus.

title: Cloud Infrastructure Intern
description: Automate infrastructure checks and support observability improvements.
details: Team values scripting ability, ownership, and concise incident communication.

title: Frontend Engineering Intern
description: Develop inclusive UI features and component patterns for campus products.
details: Great fit for students with frontend class projects and strong product sense.

title: Finance Analytics Intern
description: Create analytical briefs and automate recurring performance reporting.
details: Includes presentation support for weekly portfolio review meetings.

title: Health Data Operations Intern
description: Improve health operations data quality and triage data pipeline issues.
details: Applicants should show attention to detail and comfort with ambiguous datasets.

title: Mobile App Engineering Intern
description: Build features for a transportation app used by students and staff.
details: Interns own one production feature end-to-end with mentorship from senior engineers.

title: Growth + Product Marketing Intern
description: Run campaign experiments and report conversion results with product context.
details: Ideal for students interested in product storytelling and quantitative iteration.
